modify_files.name: modify_files
modify_files.label: Modify Files
modify_files.description: This action may create, modify, or delete files in your project directory.
modify_files.default_explanation: The coding agent will modify files according to the approved plan. Review changes after completion.

install_packages.name: install_packages
install_packages.label: Install Packages
install_packages.description: This action may install or update software packages.
install_packages.default_explanation: The coding agent may install new dependencies or update existing ones. Review changes after completion.

destructive.name: destructive
destructive.label: Destructive
destructive.description: This action may permanently discard progress or data.
destructive.default_explanation: This action will discard uncompleted work and cannot be undone. Make sure you want to proceed.

git_operation.name: git_operation
git_operation.label: Git Operation
git_operation.description: This action performs git operations that may affect version history.
git_operation.default_explanation: The coding agent may commit, branch, or otherwise modify git history. Review changes after completion.

config_change.name: config_change
config_change.label: Configuration Change
config_change.default_explanation: The coding agent may modify configuration files. Review changes after completion.
